name: HRY_INTERFACE_MESSAGE_DETAILS
description: Data to be stored for Message and its corresponding details.

columns.Name: INTERFACE_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: The column stores the interface_run_id value generated for the table hry_interface_runs.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates a unique sequence generated value.

columns.Name: KEY_ID
columns.Comments: The column stores the id value for a specific key type.

columns.Name: KEY_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column stores the type of the key.

columns.Name: MESSAGE
columns.Comments: The column stores the Validation Messages.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column stores the type of a Message.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_SEQ_NUM
columns.Comments: The column indicates a message sequence number corresponding to a particular interface run id value.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_DETAIL
columns.Comments: The column indicates message detail value
